ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Continued To May-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie in Propria Persona.

Mr. Louie stated that the inventory is almost complete, that he will likely file it within two months and requested an additional six months for closing of the estate or filing a report. Mr. Louie also explained that the Decedent had forty years of documents, that some of the institutions no longer exist and that they had to determine which assets to marshal. Status on close of the estate is continued to May 1, 2017. The Order to Appear is off calendar. Mr. Louie was advised to file a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Apr-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on April 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal, Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have not been filed. Status on close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
